basic_details.job_title: NIT Agartala Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Agartala (NIT Agartala) has officially announced the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. The detailed notification has been published under Advertisement No. F.NITA.IL (Physics)/ Project 2026/ANRF/JRF/2574-17 on the official NIT Agartala website. Candidates holding an M.Sc. in Physics/ Applied Physics, BS-MS in Physics, BT-MT in Engineering Physics, or M.Sc./ M.Tech in Nanotechnology/ Material Science with a valid GATE/ NET score can submit their applications through email on or before 24 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notificat

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Physics/ Applied Physics/BS-MS in Physics/ BT-MT in Engineering Physics/MSc or M Tech in Nanotechnology/ Material Science with valid GATE/NET score.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc in Physics/ Applied Physics/BS-MS in Physics/ BT-MT in Engineering Physics/MSc or M Tech in Nanotechnology/ Material Science with valid GATE/NET score. Experience: Experience on Synthesis of Nanomaterials and Sensors (Desirable)

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000 only per month (as per ANRF norms)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Agartala Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Agartala Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Agartala Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Agartala Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

NIT Agartala Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Agartala Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Agartala Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Agartala JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 24th July 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 only, as per the norms of the Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF).

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc in Physics/Applied Physics/BS-MS in Physics/BT-MT in Engineering Physics/MSc or M Tech in Nanotechnology/Material Science, along with a valid GATE/NET score.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Experience on Synthesis of Nanomaterials and Sensors is desirable but not mandatory for this Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview, which can be conducted either offline or online via Google Meet.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through email. Interested candidates need to send their filled application form and relevant documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is F.NITA.IL (Physics)/Project 2026/ANRF/JRF/2574-17.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIT Agartala located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology, Agartala is located in Agartala, Tripura, with the pincode 799046.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job, meaning the tenure of employment is linked to the duration of the research project.
